name: Decimal for Financial Calculations
description: All monetary amounts must use Decimal (or NSDecimalNumber), never Float or Double, to avoid floating-point precision errors.
auto_fix_hint: Replace Double/Float with Decimal for all monetary values

examples.bad:
var balance: Double = 1000.50
var fee: Float = 2.50
let total = balance + fee // ❌ Floating-point imprecision
examples.good:
var balance: Decimal = 1000.50
var fee: Decimal = 2.50
let total = balance + fee // ✅ Exact decimal arithmetic

name: Transaction Idempotency
description: All financial transactions must include an idempotency key to prevent duplicate charges on retry.
auto_fix_hint: Add Idempotency-Key header (UUID) to payment API calls

name: Audit Logging for Financial Operations
description: All financial operations (transfers, payments, withdrawals) must generate audit log entries with timestamp, user ID, and operation details.
auto_fix_hint: Add AuditLogger.log() call before and after each financial operation

name: Transfer Limit Validation
description: All transfers must validate against per-transaction and daily limits before submission.
auto_fix_hint: Add limit validation before calling the transfer API

name: Screen Recording Prevention
description: Banking screens showing sensitive information must detect and blur/prevent screen recording.
auto_fix_hint: Use UITextField.isSecureTextEntry = true and detect UIScreen.isCaptured

examples.bad: // Account balance view with no recording protection

name: Session Timeout Implementation
description: Banking apps must auto-logout after a configurable period of inactivity (default: 5 minutes).
auto_fix_hint: Implement session timer that resets on user interaction

examples.bad: // No session timeout — user stays logged in indefinitely
